creator: vezhlys@gmail.com
text: The issue still persists on 12.2-RELEASE, however I have a bit more information. System successfully boots without SMP. The crash seemingly happens on second CPU (core) initialization (panic message prints cpuid = 1, time = 1). Just for information, CPU itself does not support PAE (flags from /proc/cpuinfo: fpu pse tsc msr cx8 apic sep pge cmov mmx fxsr sse cpuid).
